{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231517000DAC41E8DF6E759AB02D"}"},"total":11},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7532849865539830553","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"癫的很，但是确实很有趣。主角确实是全能的，希望主角把地球或者宇宙改造成人道天堂，然后去诸天旅行。也只能是旅行，毕竟主角真的是全能[捂脸]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753880461,"group_id":"7520904749781109785","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"读书破万卷，下笔如有神","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+/Deb06fOGeLZYf97BOU+w=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"734129256410855","user_name":"爱吃酸奶菠菜的天若兰"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"734129256410855","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1655560927,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7520904749781109785","book_info":{"abstract":"没有穿越，不过是一觉醒来，何帝获得了全能之力，或者什么别的描述。
让他明白，他已经无所不能了！他可以办到他曾经办不到的事情！即便这个事情有多离谱，但在他面前，没有什么是不可能的！
把缩小地球当网球拍？随手创造一个世界？带着人类征服星空？鱼缸里放着一群文明舰队？一念生万界，一念毁万界？
有什么想法，那边去干！给每一个位面带来不同的变化！
